# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.

Write secure code.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3  # Istio's version of the API (should match your deployment)
kind: DestinationRule   # This is for configuring egress traffic routing to external hosts in a microservice-based architecture, similar as DNS resolution and service discovery within an application layer on top. In this case we are using it here because Istio's sidecar injection does not support custom domains or subdomains yet
metadata:  # Metadata for the DestinationRule object (similar to Kubernetes metadata)
  name: default   # Name of our rule, similar as a namespace in k8s. This is required and must be unique within Istio's control plane resources set at `ISTIO_MUTUAL` environment variable or by setting it explicitly when creating the DestinationRule object using command line tool
spec:  # Specification for our rule (similar to Kubernetes spec)
